tips: From the 2nd time, 'Open' takes you directly to the article
Notifications are not stored when Batch Mode is OFF
You can check LINE messages without marking them as read
Use Stars to bookmark important notifications
You can allow normal notifications per app in Settings
People check their phones an average of 96 times a day
It takes about 23 minutes to regain focus after responding to a notification
Checking notifications in batches frees up cognitive resources for important work
This Tips bar is recommended until you get used to the app. You can hide it in Settings
